creator: tmdraney@yahoo.com
text:
I built XFCE4 from ports using updated ports as of 11/27/2007.  Xfce starts up and runs fine.  Everything works until I try to move any application icon around on the taskbar or iconbox.  For example if I move the clock from the iconbox to the taskbar above the taskbar and iconbox disappear.  Presumably they are crash.  The rest of the XFCE desktop remains.  The devices on the desktop and when I left click the menu appears.  When I shutdown X there are no messages showing error.  Everything else seems to be working so far on my transition to 7.0.

Fix: 

Not known
How-To-Repeat: Move any icon around the taskbar or iconbox by left clicking the item and selecting move.
